metadata.title: CM to Inches Calculator – Convert Centimeters to Inches
metadata.description: Convert centimeters to inches instantly. Check height, clothing sizes, TV screen diagonal, and luggage dimensions. Conversion table from cm to inches and inches to cm.

hero.title: Convert centimeters to inches
hero.description: Enter any value in centimeters and instantly see the result in inches. This converter comes in handy wherever dimensions are given in the imperial system: checking height, buying electronics, ordering clothes from US or UK stores, or verifying luggage size limits.

software.description: Free centimeters to inches converter that runs in your browser with no sign-up required. Enter a value in cm and instantly get the result in inches. Useful for checking height, clothing sizes from European stores, TV screen diagonals, or airline luggage dimensions.

howTo.name: How to convert centimeters to inches?
howTo.description: Quick guide to using the cm to inches converter.

steps.name: Enter the value in centimeters
steps.text: Type the number of centimeters you want to convert into inches in the left field.

steps.name: Read the result in inches
steps.text: The result in inches appears instantly in the field next to it. Click once to copy it to the clipboard.

steps.name: Swap direction if needed
steps.text: Click Swap to switch the converter to inches-to-centimeters mode.

contentBlocks.title: Why convert centimeters to inches?
contentBlocks.html:
Centimeters are the standard unit of length in most of the world. Inches, on the other hand, dominate in the United States and are still widely used in the United Kingdom. The need to convert arises whenever you encounter dimensions from a metric source: a product listing from a European store, a height given in centimeters by a foreign contact, or clothing size charts that use metric measurements.

One inch is exactly 2.54 cm. This relationship is fixed and universal, so every conversion comes down to a single division. The converter does that for you the moment you type a value.

Further down the page you will find a conversion table for values from 0.5 cm to 200 cm, a separate height table with feet-and-inches equivalents, a popular screen size table, and a reverse table for inches to centimeters.
contentBlocks.imageAlt: Free centimeters to inches converter – Arteon

contentBlocks.title: How does cm to inches conversion work? Formula and example
contentBlocks.html:
The conversion between centimeters and inches is based on one fixed constant: one inch equals exactly 2.54 cm. To convert centimeters to inches, divide the value by 2.54.

Full formula: inches = centimeters ÷ 2.54. The reverse: centimeters = inches × 2.54.

Example: you want to know how many inches 170 cm is (a common height). Calculation: 170 ÷ 2.54 = 66.93 inches. Converted to feet and inches that gives 5 ft 7 in, because one foot is 12 inches and 66.93 ÷ 12 = 5 feet with 6.93 inches remaining.

Another example: a 55-inch TV has a screen diagonal of 55 × 2.54 = 139.70 cm. The converter handles both directions the moment you type a value, so no manual calculation is needed.

contentBlocks.title: TV and monitor screen size in inches – how many centimeters?
contentBlocks.description: Electronics manufacturers always list screen diagonal in inches. The table below shows how many centimeters each popular size measures, from desktop monitors to large TVs. The value refers to the diagonal, not the width.

contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert centimeters to inches?
contentBlocks.description: Converting cm to inches comes up in a few specific situations. Here is what to keep in mind for each.

items.title: Height and body measurements
items.description: In the US and UK, height is given in feet and inches. If you encounter a height listed in centimeters — from a European contact, a medical form, or an international dating profile — this converter gives you the result immediately. 170 cm is 5 feet 7 inches, 180 cm is 5 feet 11 inches, and 183 cm is exactly 6 feet.

items.title: Clothing sizes from European stores
items.description: European clothing stores often list bra sizes, waist measurements, and chest circumference in centimeters. The conversion is straightforward: a chest circumference of 80 cm is 31.5 inches, 90 cm is 35.4 inches, and 100 cm is 39.4 inches. Always check the size chart for the specific brand, as sizing standards vary.

items.title: TVs, monitors, and screens
items.description: Screen diagonals are always listed in inches, regardless of where you buy. A popular 55-inch TV has a diagonal of 139.7 cm, and 65 inches comes to 165.1 cm. Knowing the centimeter value helps you plan the space and check whether the screen fits where you intend to put it.

items.title: Luggage dimensions
items.description: Many airlines, particularly US carriers, list carry-on and checked luggage limits in inches. The common checked baggage limit is 62 linear inches (height + width + depth combined), which is exactly 157.48 cm — that is why European airlines state it as 158 cm. A standard carry-on measuring 55 × 40 × 20 cm has a linear sum of 115 cm, which is about 45.3 linear inches.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about converting cm to inches

items.question: How many inches is 1 centimeter?
items.answer: One centimeter is approximately 0.3937 inches. This follows from the fixed relationship 1 inch = 2.54 cm, so 1 cm = 1 ÷ 2.54 ≈ 0.3937 in. Rounded to two decimal places: 1 cm = 0.39 in.

items.question: What is the formula to convert cm to inches?
items.answer: The formula is: inches = centimeters ÷ 2.54. One inch is exactly 2.54 cm, so to convert cm to inches you simply divide by 2.54. For example, 30 cm ÷ 2.54 = 11.81 inches.

items.question: How many inches is 170 cm?
items.answer: 170 cm is 66.93 inches, which in feet and inches is 5 ft 7 in. Calculation: 170 ÷ 2.54 = 66.93 in; 66.93 ÷ 12 = 5 feet with 6.93 inches remaining, rounded to 7.

items.question: How many inches is 15 cm?
items.answer: 15 cm is 5.91 inches. Calculation: 15 ÷ 2.54 = 5.91 in. For a quick comparison: that is roughly the longer side of a smartphone or half of a standard 12-inch ruler.

items.question: How many inches is 20 cm?
items.answer: 20 cm is 7.87 inches. Calculation: 20 ÷ 2.54 = 7.87 in. Rounded: 20 cm is just under 8 inches.

items.question: How many inches is 40 cm?
items.answer: 40 cm is 15.75 inches. Calculation: 40 ÷ 2.54 = 15.75 in. Among other things, that is the typical width of a cabin suitcase (55 × 40 × 20 cm).

items.question: How many centimeters is one inch?
items.answer: One inch is exactly 2.54 cm. This is a defined constant established in 1959 as the international inch standard, so the conversion is always exact with no rounding needed.

items.question: How many inches is 50 cm?
items.answer: 50 cm is 19.69 inches — nearly 20 inches. Calculation: 50 ÷ 2.54 = 19.69 in.

items.question: How big is a 55-inch TV in centimeters?
items.answer: A 55-inch TV has a screen diagonal of 55 × 2.54 = 139.70 cm. Keep in mind that this is the diagonal, not the width. The width of a 16:9 screen at 55 inches is about 122 cm, and the height is about 69 cm.

items.question: How do I convert cm to inches without a calculator?
items.answer: Quick approximation: divide centimeters by 2.5 instead of 2.54. The error is minimal (about 1.6%), which works fine for rough comparisons. For example, 20 cm ÷ 2.5 = 8 inches (exact value is 7.87). For precise conversions, always use the converter.

items.question: How many inches is a 30 cm ruler?
items.answer: A 30 cm ruler is 11.81 inches. Rounded up, 30 cm is almost exactly 12 inches — one foot. In the imperial system, 12 inches = 1 foot = 30.48 cm, so the difference is just 0.48 cm.

items.question: How many inches is 25 cm?
items.answer: 25 cm is 9.84 inches. Calculation: 25 ÷ 2.54 = 9.84 in. Rounded: 25 cm is just under 10 inches.

items.question: How many inches is 17 and 18 cm?
items.answer: 17 cm is 6.69 inches and 18 cm is 7.09 inches. Calculations: 17 ÷ 2.54 = 6.69 and 18 ÷ 2.54 = 7.09. Values in this range come up often for tablets, books, and packaging dimensions.

items.question: How do I convert clothing sizes from centimeters to inches?
items.answer: Most European stores list chest, waist, and hip measurements in centimeters. To convert, divide by 2.54: a bra size listed as 80 cm = 31.5 inches, 90 cm = 35.4 inches, 100 cm = 39.4 inches. Always check the specific brand's size chart, since sizing standards vary between manufacturers.

items.question: What are the dimensions of a 55 × 40 × 20 cm carry-on in inches?
items.answer: A standard carry-on measuring 55 × 40 × 20 cm converts to approximately 21.7 × 15.7 × 7.9 inches. The linear sum (total of all three dimensions) is 45.3 inches. Many airlines allow carry-on bags up to 45 linear inches, so this bag just fits within that limit.

items.question: Where does the 2.54 cm per inch constant come from?
items.answer: The value of 2.54 cm per inch comes from historical standardization agreements. In 1930 the UK adopted this value, and in 1959 the US, Canada, Australia, and other English-speaking countries signed an agreement establishing the international inch: exactly 25.4 mm, which equals 2.54 cm. Earlier, the US survey inch (2.540005 cm) was used for geodetic measurements, but it was officially retired in 2023.

items.question: Can I convert height from cm to feet and inches with this tool?
items.answer: The converter gives the result in decimal inches (e.g., 170 cm = 66.93 in). To convert to feet and inches, divide by 12: the whole number is feet, the remainder is inches. For example, 66.93 ÷ 12 = 5 feet with 6.93 inches remaining, giving 5 ft 7 in. The height table on this page shows ready conversions for values from 150 to 200 cm.
